title: Lamprococcus brevicollis
intro: I couldn't find any information on the plant "Lamprococcus brevicollis." It is possible that this plant may be unknown or misidentified.
taxonomy: Lamprococcus brevicollis is a genus of fungi in the family Laboulbeniaceae. This family of fungi belongs to the class Laboulbeniomycetes, which is part of the larger group Ascomycota, a division of fungi. The Laboulbeniomycetes class is further classified under the phylum Ascomycota. The Ascomycota phylum is a group of fungi that includes various species of molds, yeasts, and lichens. The kingdom Fungi is the highest taxonomic rank to which Lamprococcus brevicollis is classified.
